content:
# Clef Observed Holiday List
New Year’s Day [DATE_TIME]>
Birthday of [PERSON], Jr. [DATE_TIME]>
President’s Day [DATE_TIME] 16
[PERSON] Day [DATE_TIME]>
Memorial Day [DATE_TIME] in May
Independence Day [DATE_TIME]>
Labor Day First [DATE_TIME] in September
Indigenous People’s Day Second [DATE_TIME] in October
Veterans Day [DATE_TIME]>
[DATE_TIME] and Friday Fourth [DATE_TIME] in [DATE_TIME] and following Friday
[DATE_TIME] Eve [DATE_TIME]>
Christmas Day [DATE_TIME]>
If a holiday falls on [DATE_TIME], we’ll let you know when the holiday will be observed. Usually, if a holiday falls on a [DATE_TIME], we will observe it on the [DATE_TIME] before. If it falls on a [DATE_TIME], it will be observed on the following [DATE_TIME].
